message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "UI" as UI
participant "sessionRoute" as SR
participant "passport" as passport
participant "SessionController" as SC
database "innoDB" as DB

UI -> SR : GET() "/session"\nAuth: Bearer token\n{userID, DASS21_SCORES, sessionDetails}
SR -> passport : "/save", authenticate("jwt")

alt [Success: Authenticated]
    passport --> SR : done(null, user)
    SR -> SC : Request Products
    SC -> SC : Validate info

    alt [Success: Required info provided]
        SC -> DB : saveSession()
        DB --> SC : session
        SC --> SR : httpResponse(200)\nsession
        SR --> UI : httpResponse(200)\nallProducts
    else [Failure: missing information]
        SC --> SR : {"msg":"missing required\ninformation"}(400)
        SR --> UI : http Response(400)\n{"msg":"missing required information"}
    end

else [Failure: Unauthorized]
    passport --> SR : done(null,false)
    SR --> UI : http Response(401)\nUnauthorized
end

@enduml
```
